biological_replicate: derived from peripheral blood mononuclear cells of twenty non-immunized llamas.
technical_replicate: we performed four rounds of biopanning.
experimental_design: parallel enrichment of nanobodies across immune cell subtypes
Parallel enrichment, or simultaneous enrichment of nanobodies with different selectivity for each immune cell subtype.
factor_value: cell types (CD11b+, CD11c+, CD8+, CD4+CD25+, CD4+CD25-)
We selected for CD11b+ myeloid cells, CD11c+ DCs from the CD11b− flow through, then T cells from the CD11b− and CD11c− flow through.
